<a id="index"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-compress/index.html -->

<!-- page_index: 1 -->

# Apache Commons Compress™

The Apache Commons Compress library defines an API for
working with ar, cpio, Unix dump, tar, zip, gzip, XZ, Pack200, bzip2, 7z, arj, LZMA, snappy, DEFLATE, lz4, Brotli, Zstandard, DEFLATE64 and Z files.

The code in this component has many origins:

- The bzip2, tar and zip support came from Avalon's
  Excalibur, but originally from Ant, as far as life in
  Apache goes. The tar package is originally Tim Endres'
  public domain package. The bzip2 package is based on
  the work done by Keiron Liddle as well as Julian Seward's
  [libbzip2](http://www.bzip.org/index.html).
  It has migrated
  via: Ant -> Avalon-Excalibur -> Commons-IO
  -> Commons-Compress.
- The cpio package has been contributed by Michael Kuss
  and
  the [jRPM](http://jrpm.sourceforge.net/)
  project.
- The pack200 code has originally been part of the now
  retired [Apache
  Harmony™](https://harmony.apache.org/) project.

# Status

The current release requires Java 8 or above.

For a list of changes see the [Changes Report](#changes).

# Documentation

The compress component is split into *compressors* and
*archivers*. While *compressors*
(un)compress streams that usually store a single
entry, *archivers* deal with archives that contain
structured content represented
by `ArchiveEntry` instances which in turn
usually correspond to single files or directories.

Currently the bzip2, Pack200, XZ, gzip, LZMA, brotli, Zstandard and Z formats are
supported as compressors where gzip support is mostly provided by
the `java.util.zip` package of the Java
class library. XZ and LZMA support is provided by the public
domain [XZ for
Java](https://tukaani.org/xz/java.html) library. Brotli support is provided by the MIT
licensed [Google
Brotli decoder](https://github.com/google/brotli). Zstandard support is provided by the BSD
licensed [Zstd-jni](https://github.com/luben/zstd-jni).
As of Commons Compress 1.21 support for the DEFLATE64, Z and Brotli
formats is read-only.

The ar, arj, cpio, dump, tar, 7z and zip formats are supported as
archivers where the [zip](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-compress/zip.html)
implementation provides capabilities that go beyond the
features found in java.util.zip. As of Commons Compress
1.21 support for the dump and arj formats is
read-only - 7z can read most compressed and encrypted
archives but only write unencrypted ones. LZMA(2) support
in 7z requires [XZ for
Java](https://tukaani.org/xz/java.html) as well.

The compress component provides abstract base classes for
compressors and archivers together with factories that can
be used to choose implementations by algorithm name. In
the case of input streams the factories can also be used
to guess the format and provide the matching
implementation.

- The [user guide](#examples) contains
  more detailed information and some examples.
- The [known limitations and
  problems](#limitations) page lists the currently known problems
  grouped by the format they apply to.
- The [Javadoc](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-compress/apidocs/index.html) of the latest GIT
- The [GIT
  repository](https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-compress.git) can be browsed.

# Releases

[Download now!](https://commons.apache.org/compress/download_compress.cgi)

<td>Minor feature and maintenance release.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.23.0">1.23.0</a></td>
<td>2023-03-18</td>
<td>Minor feature and maintenance release.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.22">1.22</a></td>
<td>2022-11-01</td>
<td>Minor feature and maintenance release.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.21">1.21</a></td>
<td>2021-07-12</td>
<td>Release 1.21 (Java 8 or above) ----------------------------------------  SevenZFileOptions has a new setting that needs to be enabled explicity if SevenZFile should try to recover broken archives - a feature introduced with Commons Compress 1.19. This is a breaking change if you relied on the recovery attempt.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.20">1.20</a></td>
<td>2020-02-08</td>
<td>Release 1.20 (Java 7 or above)</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.19">1.19</a></td>
<td>2019-08-27</td>
<td>Release 1.19 ----------------------------------------  ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile will no longer throw an exception if an extra field generally understood by Commons Compress is malformed but rather turn them into UnrecognizedExtraField instances. You can influence the way extra fields are parsed in more detail by using the new getExtraFields(ExtraFieldParsingBehavior) method of ZipArchiveEntry now.  Some of the ZIP extra fields related to strong encryption will now throw ZipExceptions rather than ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions in certain cases when used directly. There is no practical difference when they are read via ZipArchiveInputStream or ZipFile.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.18">1.18</a></td>
<td>2018-08-16</td>
<td>Release 1.18 ----------------------------------------  This release changes the OSGi Manifest entry Bundle-SymbolicName from org.apache.commons.compress to org.apache.commons.commons-compress.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.17">1.17</a></td>
<td>2018-06-03</td>
<td>Release 1.17</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.16.1">1.16.1</a></td>
<td>2018-02-10</td>
<td>Release 1.16.1</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.16">1.16</a></td>
<td>2018-02-05</td>
<td>Release 1.16</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.15">1.15</a></td>
<td>2017-10-17</td>
<td>Release 1.15 ----------------------------------------  TarArchiveOutputStream now ensures record size is 512 and block size is a multiple of 512 as any other value would create invalid tar archives. This may break compatibility for code that deliberately wanted to create such files.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.14">1.14</a></td>
<td>2017-05-14</td>
<td>Release 1.14</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.13">1.13</a></td>
<td>2016-12-29</td>
<td>Release 1.13 - API compatible to 1.12 but requires Java 7 at runtime.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.12">1.12</a></td>
<td>2016-06-21</td>
<td>Release 1.12 - API compatible to 1.11 but requires Java 6 at runtime. ------------    Release 1.12 changes the behavior of BZip2CompressorOutputStream's finalize method so that it no longer invokes finish. This is going to break code that relied on the finalizer to clean up an unfinished stream. The code will need to be changed to call finish or close itself. Note that a finalizer is not guaranteed to run, so the feature was not 100% effective in any case.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.11">1.11</a></td>
<td>2016-04-06</td>
<td>Release 1.11</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.10">1.10</a></td>
<td>2015-08-18</td>
<td>Release 1.10 ------------    Release 1.10 moves the former org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.z._internal_ package which breaks backwards compatibility for code which used the old package. This also changes the superclass of ZCompressorInputStream.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a1.9">1.9</a></td>
<td>2014-10-09</td>
<td>Release 1.9</td></tr>

<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.SegmentConstantPool.getClassSpecificPoolEntry(int, long, String) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on bad constant pool type input. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.SegmentConstantPool.getClassPoolEntry(String) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.ByteCode.extractOperands(OperandManager, Segment, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.forms.ByteCodeForm.setByteCodeOperands(ByteCode, OperandManager, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.CodeAttribute.CodeAttribute(int, int, byte[], Segment, OperandManager, List) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.forms.IMethodRefForm.setByteCodeOperands(ByteCode, OperandManager, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.forms.MultiANewArrayForm.setByteCodeOperands(ByteCode, OperandManager, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.forms.NewClassRefForm.setByteCodeOperands(ByteCode, OperandManager, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.bytecode.forms.ReferenceForm.setByteCodeOperands(ByteCode, OperandManager, int) now throws Pack200Exception instead of Error on some bad inputs and states. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.CanonicalCodecFamilies.CanonicalCodecFamilies(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate FileNameUtils#getBaseName(Path). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate FileNameUtils#getExtension(Path). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.Archive.unpack() should not log to system out (the console). Thanks to Alexis Jehan, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>[site] Fix minor zip docs type: remove extraneous 'a' #665. Thanks to aSemy.</td>
<td><a href="#team--sebb">Sebb</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw a better exception in org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.sevenz.SevenZFile.readFilesInfo(ByteBuffer, Archive). Thanks to Zaki, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>MemoryLimitException now extends CompressException instead of IOException (CompressException extends IOException). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DumpArchiveException now extends ArchiveException instead of IOException (ArchiveException extends CompressException). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PasswordRequiredException now extends CompressException instead of IOException (CompressException extends IOException). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Pack200Exception now extends CompressException instead of IOException (CompressException extends IOException). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream.getBSDLongName(String) now throws its EOFException with a message. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipEncodingHelper.getZipEncoding(*) can throw NullPointerException and IllegalArgumentException on bad input instead of returning a value using the default Charset. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Javadoc improvements throughout. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory.detect(inputStream) ArchiveException for TAR regression. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-699">COMPRESS-699</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Can't detect file flutter_awesome_buttons-0.1.0.tar as a TAR file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-700">COMPRESS-700</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate org.apache.commons.compress.utils.TimeUtils.toUnixTime(FileTime) in favor of org.apache.commons.io.file.attribute.FileTimes.toUnixTime(FileTime). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate org.apache.commons.compress.utils.TimeUtils.truncateToHundredNanos(FileTime). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipParameters.getModificationInstant(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipParameters.setModificationInstant(Instant). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipParameters.OS, setOS(OS), getOS(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipParameters.toString(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipParameters.setFileNameCharset(Charset) and getFileNameCharset() to override the default ISO-8859-1 Charset #602. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-638">COMPRESS-638</a>. Thanks to vincexjl, Gary Gregory, Piotr P. Karwasz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for gzip extra subfields, see GzipParameters.setExtra(HeaderExtraField) #604. Thanks to ddeschenes-1, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add CompressFilterOutputStream and refactor to use. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ZipFile.stream(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>GzipCompressorInputStream reads the modification time (MTIME) and stores its value incorrectly multiplied by 1,000. Thanks to Danny Deschenes, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>GzipCompressorInputStream writes the modification time (MTIME) the value incorrectly divided by 1,000. Thanks to Danny Deschenes, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add optional FHCRC to GZIP header #627. Thanks to Danny Deschenes, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipCompressorInputStream.Builder allowing to customize the file name and comment Charsets. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipCompressorInputStream.Builder.setOnMemberStart(IOConsumer) to monitor member parsing. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add GzipCompressorInputStream.Builder.setOnMemberEnd(IOConsumer) to monitor member parsing. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PMD check to default Maven goal. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZFile.Builder.setMaxMemoryLimitKiB(int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add MemoryLimitException.MemoryLimitException(long, int, Throwable) and deprecate MemoryLimitException.MemoryLimitException(long, int, Exception). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for zstd compression in zip archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-692">COMPRESS-692</a>. Thanks to Mehmet Karaman, Andrey Loskutov, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for XZ compression in ZIP archives. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ZipArchiveInputStream.createZstdInputStream(InputStream) to provide a different InputStream implementation for Zstandard (Zstd) #649. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-695">COMPRESS-695</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.Pack200Exception.Pack200Exception(String, Throwable). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Move BitStream.nextBit() method to BitInputStream #663. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-697">COMPRESS-697</a>. Thanks to Fredrik Kjellberg, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.lzma.LZMACompressorInputStream.builder/Builder(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.lzma.LZMACompressorOutputStream.builder/Builder(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.xz.XZCompressorInputStream.builder/Builder(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.xz.XZCompressorOutputStream.builder/Builder(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.xz.ZstdCompressorOutputStream.builder/Builder() #666. Thanks to Gary Gregory, David Walluck, Piotr P. Karwasz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.xz.ZstdConstants #666. Thanks to Gary Gregory, David Walluck, Piotr P. Karwasz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.ArchiveException.requireNonNull(T, Supplier&lt;String&gt;). Thanks to Gary Gregory, Zaki.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.CompressorException as the root for all custom exceptions ArchiveException and CompressorException. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveException.ArchiveException(String, Throwable). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveException.ArchiveException(Throwable). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.sevenz.SevenZArchiveEntry.isEmptyStream(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add generics for org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.CompressorStreamProvider.createCompressorOutputStream(String, T). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 72 to 85 #563, #567, #574, #582, #587, #595, #668. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory, sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.6-4 to 1.5.7-4 #565, #578, #601, #616, #630, #640, #642. Version 1.5.7-3 fixes https://github.com/luben/zstd-jni/pull/356 Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-lang3 from 3.16.0 to 3.18.0 #568, #678. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.16.1 to 2.20.0 #575, #610. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.marschall:memoryfilesystem from 2.8.0 to 2.8.1 #577. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.ow2.asm:asm from 9.7 to 9.7.1 #586. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.17.1 to 1.19.0 #636. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7e68712febd31cd9.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>GzipCompressorOutputStream no longer percent-endcodes in US-ASCII a file name or comment that the Charset in GzipParameters.setFileNameCharset(Charset) cannot encode. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-638">COMPRESS-638</a>. Thanks to vincexjl, Gary Gregory, Piotr P. Karwasz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7e68712febd31cd9.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Remove ZstdCompressorOutputStream.toString(), it was misleading by returning the delegate's toString(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.27.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.27.1 – 2024-08-16</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Compression into BZip2 format has unexpected end of file when using a BufferedOutputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-686">COMPRESS-686</a>. Thanks to Richard Blank, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-lang3 from 3.15.0 to 3.16.0 #556. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.27.0"></a>
<h2>Release 1.27.0 – 2024-08-03</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UnnecessaryFullyQualifiedName and others. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Support reading a 7z file that writing archive properties #541. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-681">COMPRESS-681</a>. Thanks to joker53-1, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Upgrade commons-io from 2.15.1 to 2.16.1 #513 Thanks to Mike Drob, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CompressorOutputStream now extends FilterOutputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveOutputStream now extends FilterOutputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Update Javadoc description for GzipCompressorInputStream #551. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-685">COMPRESS-685</a>. Thanks to Archie L. Cobbs, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace FileNameUtil.getCompressedFileName(String) use of Locale.ENGLISH with Locale.ROOT. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix SpotBugs DLS_DEAD_LOCAL_STORE in SevenZFile.readPackInfo(ByteBuffer, Archive). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix SpotBugs NP_NULL_ON_SOME_PATH_FROM_RETURN_VALUE in ZipFile.openZipChannel(Path, long, OpenOption[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix SpotBugs UC_USELESS_OBJECT in unpack200.CpBands.parseCpSignature(InputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UselessOverridingMethod in unpack200.bytecode.InnerClassesAttribute. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UselessOverridingMethod in unpack200.bytecode.LineNumberTableAttribute. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD CheckSkipResult in ZipArchiveInputStream.closeEntry(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveInputStream.forEach(IOConsumer). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveInputStream.iterator(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveOutputStream.isFinished(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ArchiveOutputStream.checkFinished(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replace assert with Exception. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-684">COMPRESS-684</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--sebb">sebb</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 69 to 72 #537. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump PMD from 6.x to 7.2.0. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.17.0 to 1.17.1 #544. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-lang3 from 3.14.0 to 3.15.0 #545. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>

<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.26.2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.26.2 – 2024-05-18</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate org.apache.commons.compress.utils.CharsetNames in favor or java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-665">COMPRESS-665</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Elliotte Rusty Harold.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Validate TarArchiveEntry checksums #500. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-674">COMPRESS-674</a>. Thanks to Gren Elliot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>OSGi: Remove unresolvable dependencies in manifest and make the commons-io packages really optional. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-676">COMPRESS-676</a>. Thanks to Martin Schneider.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ecki">ecki</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Avoid possible NullPointerException in org.apache.commons.compress.utils.Sets.newHashSet(E...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveOutputStream.setEncoding(String) with a null value throws IllegalArgumentException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-677">COMPRESS-677</a>. Thanks to Jeffrey Adamson, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.Archive.unpack() should not close streams it does not own (when constructed from Archive(InputStream, JarOutputStream)). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveOutputStream doesn't pad correctly when a file name length is odd and greater than 16 (padding missing). Thanks to takaaki nakama, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveOutputStream should check that a file name length greater than 16 fits in a header. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-678">COMPRESS-678</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveOutputStream implicit narrowing conversion in compound assignment. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Regression on parallel processing of 7zip files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-679">COMPRESS-679</a>. Thanks to Mikaël MECHOULAM, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Regression in pack200's Archive class -- underlying InputStream is now closed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-675">COMPRESS-675</a>. Thanks to Tim Allison, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Avoid NullPointerException in java.nio.channels.spi.AbstractInterruptibleChannel.close() when calling org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.FileRandomAccessOutputStream.close(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix SpotBugs NP_NULL_PARAM_DEREF in Sets.newHashSet(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Private class' method PackingLogger.setVerbose(boolean) should be private. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 66 to 69 #495, #508. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.ow2.asm:asm from 9.6 to 9.7 #504. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.5-11 to 1.5.6-2 #510. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.15.1 to 2.16.1 #514. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.12 to 2.0.13 #519. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.16.1 to 1.17.0. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.26.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.26.1 – 2024-03-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream should use Commons IO Charsets instead of Commons Codec Charsets. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-659">COMPRESS-659</a>. Thanks to David Handermann, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.codec to OSGi imports #482. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-660">COMPRESS-660</a>. Thanks to 660, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Return null value from getNextEntry() for empty file #486. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-664">COMPRESS-664</a>. Thanks to Radek Kraus.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove unused variables in tests #487. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-664">COMPRESS-664</a>. Thanks to Elliotte Rusty Harold.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Multithreaded access to Tar archive throws java.util.zip.ZipException: Corrupt GZIP trailer. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-666">COMPRESS-666</a>. Thanks to Cosmin Carabet, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory.detect(InputStream) returns TAR for ICO file #386. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-644">COMPRESS-644</a>. Thanks to Tim Allison, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveInputStream markSupported should always return false. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-661">COMPRESS-661</a>. Thanks to Alexander Veit, Tilman Hausherr, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7e68712febd31cd9.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Remove out of date jar and scripts #483. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-662">COMPRESS-662</a>. Thanks to Christoph Loy, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.26.0"></a>
<h2>Release 1.26.0 – 2024-02-17</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Check for invalid PAX values in TarArchiveEntry #438. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix for zero size headers in ArjInputStream #439. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixes and tests for ArInputStream #440. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixes for dump file parsing #442. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improve CPIO exception detection and handling #441. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate SkipShieldingInputStream without replacement (no longer used). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-codec, don't duplicate class PureJavaCrc32C (removed package-private class). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-codec, don't duplicate class XXHash32 (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class Charsets (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class IOUtils (deprecated methods). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class BoundedInputStream (deprecated class). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class FileTimes (deprecated TimeUtils methods). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reuse Arrays.equals(byte[], byte[]) and deprecate ArchiveUtils.isEqual(byte[], byte[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add a null-check for the class loader of OsgiUtils #451. Thanks to alumi, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add a null-check in Pack200.newInstance(String, String). Thanks to alumi, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate ChecksumCalculatingInputStream in favor of java.util.zip.CheckedInputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate CRC32VerifyingInputStream.CRC32VerifyingInputStream(InputStream, long, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>FramedSnappyCompressorOutputStream produces incorrect output when writing a large buffer #457. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-655">COMPRESS-655</a>. Thanks to cpreisler, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix TAR directory entries being misinterpreted as files #460. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-657">COMPRESS-657</a>. Thanks to Sebastian Schuberth, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate unused method FileNameUtils.getBaseName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate unused method FileNameUtils.getExtension(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveInputStream.BoundedInputStream.read() incorrectly adds 1 for EOF to the bytes read count. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate IOUtils.read(File, byte[]). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate IOUtils.copyRange(InputStream, long, OutputStream, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveOutputStream multi archive updates metadata in incorrect file #455. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-653">COMPRESS-653</a>. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate ByteUtils.InputStreamByteSupplier. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate ByteUtils.fromLittleEndian(InputStream, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate ByteUtils.toLittleEndian(DataOutput, long, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reduce duplication by having ArchiveInputStream extend FilterInputStream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Support preamble garbage in ZipArchiveInputStream #471. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix formatting the lowest expressable DOS time #472. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-658">COMPRESS-658</a>. Thanks to Arnout Engelen.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Drop reflection from ExtraFieldUtils static initialization #480. Thanks to Romain Manni-Bucau, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Preserve exception causation in ExtraFieldUtils.register(Class). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New runtime dependencies on commons-codec, commons-lang3 and commons-io. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add and use ZipFile.builder(), ZipFile.Builder, and deprecate constructors. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add and use SevenZFile.builder(), SevenZFile.Builder, and deprecate constructors. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add and use ArchiveInputStream.getCharset(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add and use ArchiveEntry.resolveIn(Path). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add Maven property project.build.outputTimestamp for build reproducibility. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-lang3 from 3.13.0 to 3.14.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.marschall:memoryfilesystem from 2.6.1 to 2.8.0 #444, #458. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io from 2.15.0 to 2.15.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 64 to 66. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.5-10 to 1.5.5-11 #448. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.9 to 2.0.12. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.16.0 to 1.16.1. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add dependency on commons-codec:commons-codec:1.16.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add dependency on org.apache.commons:commons-lang3:3.14.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add dependency on commons-io:commons-io:2.15.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.25.0"></a>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
