<td>Add GzipUtils.isCompressedFileName(String) and deprecate isCompressedFilename(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZOutputFile.putArchiveEntry(SevenZArchiveEntry) and deprecate putArchiveEntry(ArchiveEntry). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add generics to ChangeSet and ChangeSetPerformer. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add generics to ArchiveStreamProvider and friends. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add a generic type parameter to ArchiveOutputStream and avoid unchecked/unconfirmed type casts in subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add a generic type parameter to ArchiveInputStream and deprecate redundant get methods in subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ability to restrict autodetection in CompressorStreamFactory #433. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-648">COMPRESS-648</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Precompile regular expression in ArArchiveInputStream.isBSDLongName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Precompile regular expression in ArArchiveInputStream.isGNULongName(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Precompile regular expression in TarArchiveEntry.parseInstantFromDecimalSeconds(String). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Precompile regular expression in ChangeSet.addDeletion(Change). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improve performance in BlockLZ4CompressorOutputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-649">COMPRESS-649</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Null-guard Lister.main(String[]) for programmatic invocation. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>NPE in pack200.NewAttributeBands.Reference.addAttributeToBand(NewAttribute, InputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Incorrect lazy initialization and update of static field in pack200.CodecEncoding.getSpecifier(Codec, Codec). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Incorrect string comparison in unpack200.AttributeLayout.numBackwardsCallables(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Inefficient use of keySet iterator instead of entrySet iterator in pack200.PackingOptions.addOrUpdateAttributeActions(List, Map, int). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Package private class pack200.IcBands.IcTuple should be a static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Private class ZipFile.BoundedFileChannelInputStream should be a static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Refactor internal SevenZ AES256SHA256Decoder InputStream into a named static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Refactor internal SevenZ AES256SHA256Decoder OutputStream into a named static inner class. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use the root Locale for string conversion of command line options in org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.sevenz.CLI. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Calling PackingUtils.config(PackingOptions) with null now closes the internal FileHandler. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>LZ4 compressor throws IndexOutOfBoundsException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-650">COMPRESS-650</a>. Thanks to Chad Preisler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>LZWInputStream.initializeTables(int) should throw IllegalArgumentException instead of ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-632">COMPRESS-632</a>. Thanks to Yakov Shafranovich, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw IOException instead of ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when reading Zip with data descriptor entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-647">COMPRESS-647</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.8 to 2.0.9 #413. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.13.0 to 2.15.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.5.5-5 to 1.5.5-10 #422, #431. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.ow2.asm:asm from 9.5 to 9.6 #421. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 62 to 64 #421. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.24.0"></a>
<h2>Release 1.24.0 – 2023-09-04</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Make ZipArchiveEntry.getLocalHeaderOffset() public. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use try-with-resources in ArchiveStreamFactory #391. Thanks to Daniele Galloppo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Javadoc and code comments: Sanitize grammar issues and typos #393. Thanks to Martin Wiesner.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove redundant (null) initializations #394. Thanks to Martin Wiesner.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>[StepSecurity] ci: Harden GitHub Actions #396. Thanks to step-security-bot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.4-2 to 1.5.5-5 #377, #383, #388, #390, #400. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.5.0 to 2.6.1 #381, #385, #387. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-parent from 56 to 61 #384. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.13.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-lang3 from 3.12.0 to 3.13.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.slf4j:slf4j-api from 2.0.7 to 2.0.8. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.23.0"></a>
<h2>Release 1.23.0 – 2023-03-18</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Implicit narrowing conversion in compound assignment. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Avoid NPE in FileNameUtils.getBaseName(Path) for paths with zero elements like root paths. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Avoid NPE in FileNameUtils.getExtension(Path) for paths with zero elements like root paths. Thanks to CodeQL, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>LZMA2Decoder.decode() looses original exception. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Extract conditions and avoid duplicate code. #297. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove duplicate conditions. Use switch instead. #298. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace JUnit 3 and 4 with JUnit 5 #344, #346. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Make 'ZipFile.offsetComparator' static #353. Thanks to Glavo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The GzipCompressorOutputStream#writeHeader() uses ISO_8859_1 to write the file name and comment.
        If the strings contains non-ISO_8859_1 characters, unknown characters are displayed after decompression.
        Use percent encoding for non ISO_8859_1 characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-638">COMPRESS-638</a>. Thanks to Radar wen, Gary Gregory, Michael Osipov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Port some code from IO to NIO APIs. Thanks to Jonathan Leitschuh, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>pack200: Fix FileBands misusing InputStream#read(byte[]) #360. Thanks to Una, Gary Gregory, Jochen Wiedmann, quaternary, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add TarArchiveEntry.getLinkFlag() #365. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-641">COMPRESS-641</a>. Thanks to XenoAmess, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Integer overflow ArithmeticException in TarArchiveOutputStream #368. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-642">COMPRESS-642</a>. Thanks to Anton Klarén, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ZipFile.finalize() should not write to std err. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-502">COMPRESS-502</a>. Thanks to Dominik Stadler, Stefan Bodewig, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Use FileTime for time fields in SevenZipArchiveEntry #256. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-614">COMPRESS-614</a>. Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Fix calculation the offset of the first ZIP central directory entry #334. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-621">COMPRESS-621</a>. Thanks to Glavo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add encryption support for SevenZ #332. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-633">COMPRESS-633</a>. Thanks to Daniel Santos, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support for extra time data in Zip archives #345. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-613">COMPRESS-613</a>. Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.DefaultBackingStoreSupplier to write to a custom folder instead of the default temporary folder. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-621">COMPRESS-621</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add capability to configure Deflater strategy in GzipCompressorOutputStream: GzipParameters.setDeflateStrategy(int). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-600">COMPRESS-600</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Pascal Davoust.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7e68712febd31cd9.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Remove BZip2CompressorOutputStream.finalize() which only wrote to std err. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump mockito.version from 4.8.0 to 4.11.0 #328, #331, #340, #348. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump pmd from 6.50.0 to 6.53.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.3.0 to 2.5.0 #330, #359. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump slf4j-api from 2.0.3 to 2.0.7 #329, #333, #341, #371. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump japicmp from 0.16.0 to 0.17.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-parent from 54 to 56 #339, #349. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.2-5 to 1.5.4-2 #362, #364. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump asm from 9.4 to 9.5 #376. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.22"></a>
<h2>Release 1.22 – 2022-11-01</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix some compiler warnings in pack200 packages. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Close File input stream after unpacking in Pack200UnpackerAdapter.unpack(File, JarOutputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Pack200UnpackerAdapter.unpack(InputStream, JarOutputStream) should not close its given input stream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix minor problem in examples. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-596">COMPRESS-596</a>. Thanks to Tamas Mucs.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peter-lee">Peter Lee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add a limit to the copy buffer in IOUtils.readRange() to
        avoid reading more from a channel than asked for.
        Github Pull Request #214. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-584">COMPRESS-584</a>. Thanks to Matthijs Laan, Peter Lee.</td>
<td><a href="#team--matthijsln">matthijsln</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Documentation nits #217. Thanks to Helder Magalhães, Gary Gregory, PeterAlfredLee.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace wrapper Collections.sort is with an instance method directly. #245. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace manual comparisons with Comparator.comparingInt() #244. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace manual copy of array contents with System.arraycopy() #246. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix thread safety issues when encoding 7z password #248. Thanks to Glavo, Bruno P. Kinoshita, PeterAlfredLee, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>bzip2: calculate median-of-3 on unsigned values #242. Thanks to Peter Dettman.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use Math.min and Math.max calculations. #247. Thanks to Arturo Bernal, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Expander should be able to work if an entry's name is "./". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-603">COMPRESS-603</a>. Thanks to Matt Sicker.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peter-lee">Peter Lee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Ensure compatibility with Java 8 #252. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-604">COMPRESS-604</a>. Thanks to Andre Brait.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use StringBuilder instead of StringBuffer. #284. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Inline variable. Remove redundant local variable. #283. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use compare method #285. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove Unnecessary interface modifiers #281. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Avoid use C-style array declaration. #282. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ChecksumVerifyingInputStream.read() does not always validate checksum at end-of-stream. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix TarFileTest #289. Thanks to Matt Juntunen.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Update Wikipedia link in TarUtils.java:627. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-625">COMPRESS-625</a>. Thanks to MrBump, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>OutOfMemoryError on malformed pack200 input (attributes). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-626">COMPRESS-626</a>. Thanks to Andrii Hudz, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>OutOfMemoryError on malformed pack200 input (org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.NewAttributeBands.readNextUnionCase). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-628">COMPRESS-628</a>. Thanks to Andrii Hudz, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>OutOfMemoryError on malformed unpack200 input (org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.unpack200.NewAttributeBands.readNextUnionCase). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-628">COMPRESS-628</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Some input streams are not closed in org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.PackingUtils. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Pack200 causes a 'archive.3E' error if it’s not in the system class loader. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-627">COMPRESS-627</a>. Thanks to anatawa12, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Migrate ZIP package to use NIO #236. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-602">COMPRESS-602</a>. Thanks to Postelnicu George, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add APK file extension constants: ArchiveStreamFactory.APK, APKM, APKS, XAPK. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory.createArchiveInputStream(String, InputStream, String) supports the "APK" format (it's a JAR). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Expander example now has NIO Path versions of IO File APIs. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Improve TAR support for file times #254. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-612">COMPRESS-612</a>. Thanks to Andre Brait, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZArchiveEntry.setContentMethods(SevenZMethodConfiguration...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>

<tr>

<tr>

<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump github/codeql-action from 1 to 2 #287. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump mockito-core from 3.11.1 to 4.6.1 #209, #224, #231, #235, #243, #253, #286, #294. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.felix.framework from 7.0.0 to 7.0.1 #208. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump memoryfilesystem from 2.1.0 to 2.3.0 #212, #237. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump zstd-jni from 1.5.0-2 to 1.5.2-5 #215, #233, #238, #240, #250, #291, #326. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Pack200 packages from ASM 3.2 to 9.2 #216.
        Breaks binary compatibility in the internals of the pack200 implementation:
        - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.Segment
        - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentMethodVisitor
        - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentAnnotationVisitor
        - org.apache.commons.compress.harmony.pack200.SegmentFieldVisitor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-582">COMPRESS-582</a>. Thanks to Alex Landau, Stephan, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump asm from 9.2 to 9.4 #279, #322. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-javadoc-plugin from 3.3.0 to 3.4.1 #221, #249, #288, #308. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-pmd-plugin from 3.14.0 to 3.19.0 #296, #309, #311. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump pmd from 6.44.0 to 6.50.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.japicmp.version from 0.15.3 to 0.16.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-bundle-plugin from 5.1.2 to 5.1.8 #234, #239, #290, #292, #301, #304. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.felix.framework from 7.0.1 to 7.0.5 #232, #295. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump slf4j-api from 1.7.30 to 2.0.3 #213, #241, #258, #310, #314, #315, #318. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-parent from 52 to 54 #280. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.jacoco.version from 0.8.7 to 0.8.8. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump junit.version from 5.8.2 to 5.9.1 #302, #317. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump mockito.version from 4.6.1 to 4.8.0 #307, #312. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-surefire-plugin from 3.0.0-M6 to 3.0.0-M7. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.21"></a>
<h2>Release 1.21 – 2021-07-12</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Made sure ZstdCompressorOutputStream no longer used
        deprecated ZstOutputStream constructors.
        Github Pull Request #94. Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Make compression level of ParallelScatterZipCreator
        configurable via a new constructor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-504">COMPRESS-504</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix bugs in random access of 7z. Problems may happen
        in a mixture use of random access and sequential access
        of 7z.
        Github Pull Request #95. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-505">COMPRESS-505</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix bugs in random access of 7z. Exceptions are thrown
        when reading the first entry multiple times by random
        access. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-510">COMPRESS-510</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add '/' to directories with long name in tar. This is to
        resolve the ambiguous behavior of the TarArchiveEntry.getName()
        method between directory with short name and long name. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-509">COMPRESS-509</a>. Thanks to Petr Vasak.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed the PowerMock dependency. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-520">COMPRESS-520</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added improved checks to detect corrupted bzip2 streams and
        throw the expected IOException rather than obscure
        RuntimeExceptions.
        See also COMPRESS-519. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-516">COMPRESS-516</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved parsing of X5455_ExtendedTimestamp ZIP extra field. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-517">COMPRESS-517</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile will now throw an
        IOException rather than a RuntimeException if the zip64 extra
        field of an entry could not be parsed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-518">COMPRESS-518</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved detection of corrupt ZIP archives in ZipArchiveInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-523">COMPRESS-523</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added improved checks to detect corrupted deflate64 streams and
        throw the expected IOException rather than obscure
        RuntimeExceptions.
        See also COMPRESS-522, COMPRESS-525, COMPRESS-526, and COMPRESS-527. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-521">COMPRESS-521</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add the archive name in the exception in the constructor of
        ZipFile to make it a more specific exception.
        Github Pull Request #102. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-515">COMPRESS-515</a>. Thanks to ian-lavallee.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw IOException when it encounters a non-number while parsing pax header. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-530">COMPRESS-530</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw IOException when a tar archive contains a PAX header
        without any normal entry following it. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-531">COMPRESS-531</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added improved checks to detect corrupted IMPLODED streams and
        throw the expected IOException rather than obscure
        RuntimeExceptions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-532">COMPRESS-532</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw expected IOException instead of NumberFormatException if
        it encounters non-numbers when parsing pax headers for tarball.

        Throw IllegalArgumentException instead of RuntimeExceptions if
        the file name is longer than 100 bytes with the longFileMode
        of LONGFILE_ERROR, and address this in java docs.

        Throw IllegalArgumentException instead of RuntimeExceptions if
        the any of the numeric values of an entry exceeds the limits
        of a traditional tar header while bigNumberMode is
        BIGNUMBER_ERROR, and address this in java docs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-529">COMPRESS-529</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Made an inner class static
        Github Pull Request #107. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-536">COMPRESS-536</a>. Thanks to Jin Xu.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>added an early exit to a loop in BZip2CompressorOutputStream
        Github Pull Request #106. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-535">COMPRESS-535</a>. Thanks to Jin Xu.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update the class of variable file in TarArchiveEntry from
        java.io.File to java.nio.file.Path. Corresponding constructors
        and methods are also modified/added.

        NOTE: The userName, groupName, userID and groupID will also be
        set if they are available. The userName and groupName was not
        set previously, and the previous value of UserID:GroupID was
        0:0 by default.
        Please note this may cause a reproducibility problem.

        Github Pull Request #97. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-404">COMPRESS-404</a>. Thanks to theobisproject.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Reuse the record buffer in TarArchiveInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-539">COMPRESS-539</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZOutputFile.write(InputStream). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZOutputFile.write(Path, OpenOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add SevenZOutputFile.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add ArArchiveOutputStream.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add ArArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add ctor CpioArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add ctor CpioArchiveEntry(short, Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add CpioArchiveEntry.setTime(FileTime). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add TarArchiveOutputStream.createArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add ctor TarArchiveEntry(Path, String, LinkOption...). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add IOUtils.EMPTY_LINK_OPTIONS. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add Path support to ZipArchiveOutputStream #123. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix for test fails on Windows. The tests are failing because the
        default charset is not UTF-8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-543">COMPRESS-543</a>. Thanks to wulf2333.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream can not detect a truncated tar in skip()
        and skipRecordPadding(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-544">COMPRESS-544</a>. Thanks to Aditya Prasad.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Make the memory allocation in SevenZFile.readFilesInfo a lazy
        allocation to avoid OOM when dealing some giant 7z archives.
        Github Pull Request #120.

        Also added sanity checks before even trying to parse an
        archive and made SevenZFileOptions' maxMemorySizeInKb apply to
        the stored metadata for an archive.

        And further added an option that needs to be enabled in order
        to make SevenZFile try to recover a broken archive. This is a
        backwards incompatible change. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-542">COMPRESS-542</a>. Thanks to theobisproject.</td>
<td><a href="#team--theobisproject">theobisproject</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream should throw an exception if a corrputed
        zip64 extra field is met. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-546">COMPRESS-546</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add a new maven profile in pom.xml for JDK14+ to ignore the
        failing tests about Pack200.

        This has later been superseeded by adding the Apache Harmony
        classes for Pack200 support.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw an IOException when reading the ZIP extra field if the
        length is too short. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-548">COMPRESS-548</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw an declared IOException if a null entry is met when
        reading a global pax header instead of a runtime NPE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-554">COMPRESS-554</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZIP extraction could lead to ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions
        rather than the expected IOException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-545">COMPRESS-545</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add asserts for Arrays.copyOf in X0017_StrongEncryptionHeader. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-547">COMPRESS-547</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add writePreamble to ZipArchiveInputStream. This method could
        write raw data to ZIP archive before any entry was written to
        the ZIP archive.
        For most of the time, this is used to create self-extracting
        ZIP.
        Github Pull Request #127. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-550">COMPRESS-550</a>. Thanks to Scott Frederick.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix for the CFH signature detect in ZipArchiveInputStream.
        The problem could be reproduced by a ZIP archive with Data
        Descriptor and STORED, and without the Data Descriptor
        signature.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The length validation in TarArchiveInputStream.parsePaxHeaders
        should also consider the headers with length smaller than 1
        and ignore these headers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-553">COMPRESS-553</a>. Thanks to Maksim Zuev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix accidentally added '/' to file names.
        This problem is caused by the incomplete fix of
        COMPRESS-509.
        Github Pull Request #151. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-558">COMPRESS-558</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td><a href="#team--robin-schimpf">Robin Schimpf</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>As sparse entries can be successfully parsed now,
        TarArchiveInputStream.canReadEntryData should return
        true if the entry is a sparse entry.
        Github Pull Request #153. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-560">COMPRESS-560</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td><a href="#team--robin-schimpf">Robin Schimpf</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SparseFilesTest#testExtractPaxGNU should be skipped
        if the version of GNU tar binary is 1.28.
        Github Pull Request #152. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-559">COMPRESS-559</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td><a href="#team--robin-schimpf">Robin Schimpf</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Some minor improvements.
        Github Pull Request #157. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-561">COMPRESS-561</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--arturo-bernal">Arturo Bernal</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for random access to the TAR packages.
        Github Pull Request #113. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-540">COMPRESS-540</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td><a href="#team--robin-schimpf">Robin Schimpf</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for BufferPool in ZstdCompressorInputStream.
        Github Pull Request #165. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-565">COMPRESS-565</a>. Thanks to Michael L Heuer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed an empty loop that was just warming the planet for
        certain ZIP archives.
        Github Pull Request #172. Thanks to Fabian Meumertzheim.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Made some of the stream classes used internally throw
        IOExceptions on illegal arguments rather than
        RuntimeExceptions to make it more likely that corrupt archives
        cause expected checked exceptions rather than RuntimException
        for various formats.

        Fixes a specific case for ZIP but affects other formats as
        well. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-567">COMPRESS-567</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Commons Compress cannot be built with JDK14 due to Pack200 removal.
        Add Pack200 implementation from Apache Harmony. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-507">COMPRESS-507</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Apache Harmony.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Simplify Assertions #205. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update from Java 7 to 8.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update GitHub actions/checkout from v1 to v2.3.4, #114, #124, #139, #150. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update actions/setup-java from v1.4.0 to v2, #125, #133, #141. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.4-7 to 1.5.0-2, #118, #159, #173, #174, #203. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update tests slf4j-api from 1.7.26 to 1.7.30 #117. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update maven-pmd-plugin from 3.12.0 to 3.14.0, #115, #154. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update maven-bundle-plugin from 3.5.1 to 5.1.2 #116, #180. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump memoryfilesystem from 1.3.0 to 2.1.0 #131. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump actions/cache from v2 to v2.1.6, #164, #200. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump junit from 4.13 to 4.13.2, #143, #167. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump mockito-core from 1.10.19 to 3.11.1, #161, #170, #204. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.jacoco.version from 0.8.5 to 0.8.7 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.felix:org.apache.felix.framework from 6.0.3 to 7.0.0 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.japicmp.version from 0.14.3 to 0.15.3 (Java 16 builds). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.javadoc.version from 3.2.0 to 3.3.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Checked the sizes read for archive entries and reject archives
        as broken with negative entry sizes.

        Fixes an infinite loop in the new TarFile class but affects
        several formats. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-569">COMPRESS-569</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>OSGi detection was broken and so we always cached whether
        XZ/brotli/zstd/LZMA have been available even in OSGi
        environments. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-552">COMPRESS-552</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile.getEntries now return a copy of entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-571">COMPRESS-571</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.8-7 to 1.4.9-1 #176. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Handling of sparse tar entries has been hardened to ensure bad
        inputs cause expected IOExceptions rather than RuntimeExceptions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-575">COMPRESS-575</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update org.tukaani:xz from 1.8 to 1.9</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add a new AlwaysWithCompatibility in Zip64Mode, this is a
        compromise for some libraries including 7z and Expand-Archive
        Powershell utility(and likely Excel).

        And we will encode both the LFH offset and Disk Number Start
        in the ZIP64 Extended Information Extra Field - even if only
        the disk number needs to be encoded.

        Github Pull Request #169. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-565">COMPRESS-565</a>. Thanks to Evgenii Bovykin.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peterlee">PeterLee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Some minor improvements.
        Github Pull Request #193. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-577">COMPRESS-577</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--arturo-bernal">Arturo Bernal</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Java8 improvements.
        Github Pull Request #194. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-578">COMPRESS-578</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--arturo-bernal">Arturo Bernal</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Remove redundant local variable.
        Github Pull Request #195. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-579">COMPRESS-579</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--arturo-bernal">Arturo Bernal</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Remove redundant operation
        Github Pull Request #196. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-580">COMPRESS-580</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--arturo-bernal">Arturo Bernal</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>gzip deflate buffer size is now configurable. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-566">COMPRESS-566</a>. Thanks to Brett Okken.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The parser for GNU sparse tar headers could throw a
        NullPointerExcpetion rather than an IOException if the archive
        ended while more sparse headers were expected.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Call enableRelaxedEndCondition() to enable decoding of 7z
        files containing LZMA streams with end marker.
        Github Pull Request #223. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-591">COMPRESS-591</a>. Thanks to Lasse Collin.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peter-lee">Peter Lee</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use LinkedHashMap for fileMap in SevenZFile.readFilesInfo,
        as it will be read in specific order. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-592">COMPRESS-592</a>. Thanks to Roland Kreuzer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--peter-lee">Peter Lee</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.20"></a>
<h2>Release 1.20 – 2020-02-08</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update optional library com.github.luben:zstd-jni from 1.4.0-1 to 1.4.4-7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-493">COMPRESS-493</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update tests from org.apache.felix:org.apache.felix.framework 6.0.2 to 6.0.3.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile could throw NullPointerException rather than
        IOException for certain archives. In addition it now handles
        certain empty archives more gracefully. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-492">COMPRESS-492</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deflate64CompressorInputStream.read would return 0 for some
        inputs in violation of the InputStream.read contract. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-491">COMPRESS-491</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7e68712febd31cd9.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Removed the extraction code from the example CLI class inside
        of the SevenZ package. Not only is it superseeded by the
        examples package, its implementation was vulnerable to the
        ZipSlip attack. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-495">COMPRESS-495</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile can now recover from a certain corruption that
        seems to happen occasionally when split archives are created. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-497">COMPRESS-497</a>. Thanks to Stefan Schlott.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added random access support to SevenZFile. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-342">COMPRESS-342</a>. Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added support for split ZIP archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-477">COMPRESS-477</a>. Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added support for reading sparse entries to the TAR package. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-124">COMPRESS-124</a>. Thanks to Peter Alfred Lee.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SeekableInMemoryByteChannel's truncate didn't set position
        according to the spec in an edge case. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-499">COMPRESS-499</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream now incorporates a similar patch as
        the one that fixed CVE-2019-12900 in libbzip2.

        Commons Compress has not been vulnerable to this CVE as it
        would have rejected a file with too many selectors. With this
        patch Commons Compress will be able to read certain archives
        that would have caused errors in Compress 1.19. Thanks to Joseph Allemandou.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update JUnit from 4.12 to 4.13.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.19"></a>
<h2>Release 1.19 – 2019-08-27</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream could forget the compression level has
        changed under certain circumstances.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to skip parsing of local file headers when
        using ZipFile which may speed up reading the archive at the
        cost of potentially missing important information. See the
        javadocs of the ZipFile class for details. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-466">COMPRESS-466</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream has a new constructor-arg lenient that
        can be used to accept certain broken archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-469">COMPRESS-469</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed another potential resource leak in
        ParallelScatterZipCreator#writeTo. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-470">COMPRESS-470</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ArjArchiveEntry and SevenZArchiveEntry now implement hashCode
        and equals. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-475">COMPRESS-475</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream could think it had hit EOF prematurely.
        Github Pull Request #74. Thanks to Alex Bertram.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile now provides a way to cap memory consumption for
        LZMA(2) compressed content.
        Github Pull Request #76. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-481">COMPRESS-481</a>. Thanks to Robin Schimpf.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The ARJ package has been updated to contain constants for more
        recent specifications. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-464">COMPRESS-464</a>. Thanks to Rostislav Krasny.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update optional library zstd-jni from 1.3.3-3 to 1.4.0-1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-484">COMPRESS-484</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ParallelScatterZipCreator now writes the entries to the
        gathered output in the same order they have been added.
        Github Pull Requests #78 and #79. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-485">COMPRESS-485</a>. Thanks to Hervé Boutemy, Tibor Digana.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Throw IOException rather than RuntimeExceptions for certain
        malformed LZ4 or Snappy inputs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-490">COMPRESS-490</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The Expander and Archive example classes can leak resources
        they have wrapped around passed in streams or channels. The
        methods consuming streams and channels have been adapted to
        give the calling code a chance to deal with those wrapper
        resources. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-486">COMPRESS-486</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipFile no longer assume Commons
        Compress would understand extra fields better than the writer
        of the archive and silently turn extra fields that Commons
        Compress should understand into UnrecognizedExtraFields if
        parsing said fields fails.
        It is now possible to take more control over the extra field
        parsing process with a new overload of
        ZipArchiveEntry#getExtraFields. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-479">COMPRESS-479</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream failed to read stored entries with a
        data descriptor if the data descriptor didn't use the
        signature invented by InfoZIP. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-482">COMPRESS-482</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream will now throw an exception if reading a
        stored entry with a data descriptor and the data descriptor
        doesn't match what it has actually read.

        The most common case for a situation like this is a stored ZIP
        archive inside of the archive ZipArchiveInputStream currently
        reads. In such a case ZipArchiveInputStream would happily
        extract the contained archive and stop once the central
        directory of the inner archive has been hit. This is a case
        where ZipArchiveInputStream simply can not be used and only
        ZipFile is able to read the archive.

        The only other explanation is a broken archive. So the
        exception prevents users from thinking they had successfully
        read the contents of the archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-483">COMPRESS-483</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a MultiReadOnlySeekableByteChannel class
        that can be used to concatenate the parts of a multi volume 7z
        archive so that SevenZFile can read them. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-231">COMPRESS-231</a>. Thanks to Tim Underwood.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The 7zip tools provide a default name for archive entries
        without name; SevenZFile returns a null name for such
        entries. A new method getDefaultName has been added to derive
        the same name the 7zip tools would use and an option has been
        added that sets SevenZArchiveEntry's name to the default name
        if it is not contained inside the archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-478">COMPRESS-478</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>NioZipEncoding#encode could enter an infinite loop for certain
        inputs.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.18"></a>
<h2>Release 1.18 – 2018-08-16</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The example Expander class has been vulnerable to a path
        traversal in the edge case that happens when the target
        directory has a sibling directory and the name of the target
        directory is a prefix of the sibling directory's name. Thanks to DidierLoiseau.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Changed the OSGi Import-Package to also optionally import
        javax.crypto so encrypted archives can be read. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-456">COMPRESS-456</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Changed various implementations of the close method to better
        ensure all held resources get closed even if exceptions are
        thrown during the closing the stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-457">COMPRESS-457</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream can now detect the APK Signing Block
        used in signed Android APK files and treats it as an "end of
        archive" marker. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-455">COMPRESS-455</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The cpio streams didn't handle archives using a multi-byte
        encoding properly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-459">COMPRESS-459</a>. Thanks to Jens Reimann.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to specify the arguments of zstd-jni's
        ZstdOutputStream constructors via Commons Compress as well. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-460">COMPRESS-460</a>. Thanks to Carmi Grushko.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream#read would silently return -1 on a
        corrupted stored entry and even return &gt; 0 after hitting the
        end of the archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-463">COMPRESS-463</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream#read would allow to read from the stream
        without opening an entry at all. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-462">COMPRESS-462</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.17"></a>
<h2>Release 1.17 – 2018-06-03</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed the objenesis dependency from the pom as it is not
        needed at all.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed resource leak in ParallelScatterZipCreator#writeTo. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-446">COMPRESS-446</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed some code examples.
        Github Pull Request #63. Thanks to Marchenko Sergey.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Certain errors when parsing ZIP extra fields in corrupt
        archives are now turned into ZipException, they used to
        manifest as ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException before. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-447">COMPRESS-447</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The streams returned by ZipFile and most other decompressing
        streams now provide information about the number of compressed
        and uncompressed bytes read so far. This may be used to detect
        a ZipBomb if the compression ratio exceeds a certain
        threshold, for example.
        For SevenZFile a new method returns the statistics for the
        current entry. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-445">COMPRESS-445</a>. Thanks to Andreas Beeker.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a unit test that is supposed to fail if we break the
        OSGi manifest entries again. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-443">COMPRESS-443</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add a new SkipShieldingInputStream class that can be used with
        streams that throw an IOException when skip is invoked. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-449">COMPRESS-449</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>IOUtils.copy now verifies the buffer size is bigger than 0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-451">COMPRESS-451</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New constructors have been added to SevenZFile that accept
        char[]s rather than byte[]s in order to avoid a common error
        of using the wrong encoding when creating the byte[].  This
        change may break source compatibility for client code that
        uses one of the constructors expecting a password and passes
        in null as password. We recommend to change the code to use a
        constructor without password argument. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-452">COMPRESS-452</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added a workaround for a bug in AdoptOpenJDK for S/390 to
        BZip2CompressorInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-453">COMPRESS-453</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream failed to read some files with stored
        entries using a data descriptor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-454">COMPRESS-454</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.16.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.16.1 – 2018-02-10</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed the OSGi manifest entry for imports that has been broken
        in 1.16. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-442">COMPRESS-442</a>.</td>
