<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.16"></a>
<h2>Release 1.16 – 2018-02-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add read-only support for Zstandard compression based on the
        Zstd-jni project. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-423">COMPRESS-423</a>. Thanks to Andre F de Miranda.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added auto-detection for Zstandard compressed streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-425">COMPRESS-425</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Synchronized iteration over a synchronizedList in ParallelScatterZipCreator. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-430">COMPRESS-430</a>. Thanks to Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipFile could get stuck in an infinite loop when parsing ZIP
        archives with certain strong encryption headers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-432">COMPRESS-432</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replaces instanceof checks with a type marker in LZ77 support code. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-435">COMPRESS-435</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added write-support for Zstandard compression. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-426">COMPRESS-426</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added improved checks to detect corrupted bzip2 streams and
        throw the expected IOException rather than obscure
        RuntimeExceptions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-424">COMPRESS-424</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated XZ for Java dependency to 1.8 in order to pick up bug
        fix to LZMA2InputStream's available method.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveEntry now exposes how the name or comment have been
        determined when the entry was read. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-429">COMPRESS-429</a>. Thanks to Damiano Albani.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added read-only DEFLATE64 support to ZIP archives and as
        stand-alone CompressorInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-380">COMPRESS-380</a>. Thanks to Christian Marquez Grabia.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipFile.getInputStream will now always buffer the stream
        internally in order to improve read performance. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-438">COMPRESS-438</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Speed improvement for DEFLATE64 decompression. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-440">COMPRESS-440</a>. Thanks to Dawid Weiss.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added read-only DEFLATE64 support to 7z archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-437">COMPRESS-437</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added a few extra sanity checks for the rarer compression
        methods used in ZIP archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-436">COMPRESS-436</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Simplified the special handling for the dummy byte required by
        zlib when using java.util.zip.Inflater. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-441">COMPRESS-441</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Various code cleanups.
        Github Pull Request #61. Thanks to Shahab Kondri.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry's preserveLeadingSlashes constructor argument
        has been renamed and can now also be used to preserve the
        drive letter on Windows.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.15"></a>
<h2>Release 1.15 – 2017-10-17</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Make sure "version needed to extract" in local file header and
        central directory of a ZIP archive agree with each other.
        Also ensure the version is set to 2.0 if DEFLATE is used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-394">COMPRESS-394</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Don't use a data descriptor in ZIP archives when copying a raw
        entry that already knows its size and CRC information. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-395">COMPRESS-395</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Travis build redundantly repeats compilation and tests redundantly #43. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-413">COMPRESS-413</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added magic MANIFEST entry Automatic-Module-Name so the module
        name will be org.apache.commons.compress when the jar is used
        as an automatic module in Java9. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-397">COMPRESS-397</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The MANIFEST of 1.14 lacks an OSGi Import-Package for XZ for
        Java. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-396">COMPRESS-396</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BUILDING.md now passes the RAT check. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-406">COMPRESS-406</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a new utility class FixedLengthBlockOutputStream that
        can be used to ensure writing always happens in blocks of a
        given size. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-405">COMPRESS-405</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Made sure ChecksumCalculatingInputStream receives valid
        checksum and input stream instances via the constructor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-412">COMPRESS-412</a>. Thanks to Michael Hausegger.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream now verifies the block and record sizes
        specified at construction time are compatible with the tar
        specification. In particular 512 is the only record size
        accepted and the block size must be a multiple of 512.
        At the same time the default block size in
        TarArchiveOutputStream has been changed from 10240 to 512
        bytes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-407">COMPRESS-407</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to specify/read custom PAX headers when
        writing/reading tar archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-400">COMPRESS-400</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed class names of CpioArchiveEntry and
        CpioArchiveInputStream in various Javadocs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-415">COMPRESS-415</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The code of the extended timestamp ZIP extra field incorrectly
        assumed the time was stored as unsigned 32-bit int and thus
        created incorrect results for years after 2037. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-416">COMPRESS-416</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed ZipEncoding code that became obsolete when we started
        to require Java 5 as baseline long ago. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-410">COMPRESS-410</a>. Thanks to Simon Spero.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The tar package will no longer try to parse the major and
        minor device numbers unless the entry represents a character
        or block special file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-417">COMPRESS-417</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When reading tar headers with name fields containing embedded
        NULs, the name will now be terminated at the first NUL byte. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-421">COMPRESS-421</a>. Thanks to Roel Spilker.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Simplified TarArchiveOutputStream by replacing the internal
        buffering with new class FixedLengthBlockOutputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-409">COMPRESS-409</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.14"></a>
<h2>Release 1.14 – 2017-05-14</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SnappyCompressorInputStream slides the window too early
        leading to ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsExceptions for some streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-378">COMPRESS-378</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added write support for Snappy. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-246">COMPRESS-246</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The blocksize for FramedSnappyCompressorInputStream can now be
        configured as some IWA files seem to be using blocks larger
        than the default 32k. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-358">COMPRESS-358</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveEntry#isUnixSymlink now only returns true if the
        corresponding link flag is the only file-type flag set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-379">COMPRESS-379</a>. Thanks to Guillaume Boué.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for LZ4 (block and frame format). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-271">COMPRESS-271</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputstream now uses BitInputStream internally.
        Pull Request #13. Thanks to Thomas Meyer.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed an integer overflow in CPIO's CRC calculation.
        Pull Request #17. Thanks to Daniel Collin.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add static detect(InputStream in) to CompressorStreamFactory
        and ArchiveStreamFactory. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-385">COMPRESS-385</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Make unit tests work on Windows paths with spaces in their names. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-387">COMPRESS-387</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved performance for concurrent reads from ZipFile when
        reading from a file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-388">COMPRESS-388</a>. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a way to limit amount of memory ZCompressorStream may
        use. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-382">COMPRESS-382</a>. Thanks to Tim Allison.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a way to limit amount of memory ZCompressorStream may
        use. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-386">COMPRESS-386</a>. Thanks to Tim Allison.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a way to limit amount of memory LZMACompressorStream and
        XZCompressorInputStream may use. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-382">COMPRESS-382</a>. Thanks to Tim Allison.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Internal location pointer in ZipFile could get incremented
        even if nothing had been read. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-389">COMPRESS-389</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add Brotli decoder based on the Google Brotli library. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-392">COMPRESS-392</a>. Thanks to Philippe Mouawad.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipEntry now exposes its data offset. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-390">COMPRESS-390</a>. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>LZMACompressorOutputStream#flush would throw an exception
        rather than be the NOP it promised to be. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-393">COMPRESS-393</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Using ZipArchiveEntry's setAlignment it is now possible to
        ensure the data offset of an entry starts at a file position
        that at word or page boundaries.
        A new extra field has been added for this purpose. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-391">COMPRESS-391</a>. Thanks to Zbynek Vyskovsky.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.13"></a>
<h2>Release 1.13 – 2016-12-29</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update Java requirement from 6 to 7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-360">COMPRESS-360</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BitInputStream could return bad results when overflowing
        internally - if two consecutive reads tried to read more than
        64 bits. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-363">COMPRESS-363</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Clarified which TarArchiveEntry methods are useless for
        entries read from an archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-366">COMPRESS-366</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream.closeEntry does not properly advance to
        next entry if there are junk bytes at end of data section. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-364">COMPRESS-364</a>. Thanks to Mike Mole.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile, SevenZOutputFile, ZipFile and
        ZipArchiveOutputStream can now work on non-file resources if
        they can be accessed via SeekableByteChannel. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-327">COMPRESS-327</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow compressor extensions through a standard JRE ServiceLoader. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-368">COMPRESS-368</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow archive extensions through a standard JRE ServiceLoader. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-369">COMPRESS-369</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add write support for the legacy LZMA format, this requires XZ
        for Java 1.6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-373">COMPRESS-373</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add write support for the legacy LZMA stream to 7z, this
        requires XZ for Java 1.6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-374">COMPRESS-374</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow the clients of ParallelScatterZipCreator to provide
        ZipArchiveEntryRequestSupplier. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-375">COMPRESS-375</a>. Thanks to Plamen Totev.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream now throws an Exception if it encounters
        a broken ZIP archive rather than signaling end-of-archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-367">COMPRESS-367</a>. Thanks to Mike Mole.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ScatterZipOutputStream didn't close the StreamCompressor
        causing a potential resource leak. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-377">COMPRESS-377</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add a version-independent link to the API docs of the latest
        release. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-372">COMPRESS-372</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.12"></a>
<h2>Release 1.12 – 2016-06-21</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update requirement from Java 5 to 6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-349">COMPRESS-349</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry wastefully allocates empty arrays. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-350">COMPRESS-350</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile.read() throws an IllegalStateException for empty entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-348">COMPRESS-348</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Javadoc for BZip2CompressorInputStream(InputStream, boolean) should refer to IOEx, not NPE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-353">COMPRESS-353</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PureJavaCrc32C in the snappy package is now final so it is now
        safe to call a virtual method inside the constructor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-354">COMPRESS-354</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream failed to parse PAX headers that
        included blank lines. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-355">COMPRESS-355</a>. Thanks to Jeremy Gustie.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream failed to parse PAX headers whose tar
        entry name ended with a slash. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-356">COMPRESS-356</a>. Thanks to Jeremy Gustie.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>FramedSnappyCompressorInputStream now supports the dialect of
        Snappy used by the IWA files contained within the ZIP archives
        used in Apple's iWork 13 files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-352">COMPRESS-352</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream and CpioArchiveInputStream could throw
        exceptions who's messages contained potentially corrupt entry
        names read from a broken archive. They will now sanitize the
        names by replacing unprintable characters and restricting the
        length to 255 characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-351">COMPRESS-351</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorOutputStream no longer tries to finish the
        output stream in finalize. This is a breaking change for code
        that relied on the finalizer. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-357">COMPRESS-357</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.11"></a>
<h2>Release 1.11 – 2016-04-06</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream now supports reading global PAX headers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-347">COMPRESS-347</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The PAX headers for sparse entries written by star are now
        applied. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-346">COMPRESS-346</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>GNU sparse files using one of the PAX formats are now
        detected, but cannot be extracted. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-345">COMPRESS-345</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream can now read GNU extended names that are
        terminated with a NUL byte rather than a linefeed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-344">COMPRESS-344</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New method SevenZFile.getEntries can be used to list the
        contents of a 7z archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-341">COMPRESS-341</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Native Memory Leak in Sevenz-DeflateDecoder. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-343">COMPRESS-343</a>. Thanks to Rene Preissel.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>When using Zip64Mode.Always also use ZIP64 extensions inside
        the central directory.
        GitHub Pull Request #10 Thanks to Matt Hovey.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile will now only try to drain an entry's content when
        moving on to the next entry if data is read from the next
        entry. This should improve performance for applications that
        try to skip over entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-340">COMPRESS-340</a>. Thanks to Dawid Weiss.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>file names of tar archives using the xstar format are now
        parsed properly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-336">COMPRESS-336</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>checksums of tars that pad the checksum field to the left are
        now calculated properly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-335">COMPRESS-335</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream failed to read past the first entry when
        BSD long names have been used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-334">COMPRESS-334</a>. Thanks to Jeremy Gustie.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added buffering for random access which speeds up 7Z support. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-333">COMPRESS-333</a>. Thanks to Dawid Weiss.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The checksum validation of TararchiveEntry is now as strict as
        the validation of GNU tar, which eliminates a few cases of
        false positives of ArchiveStreamFactory.
        This behavior is a breaking change since the check has become
        more strict but any archive that fails the checksum test now
        would also fail it when extracted with other tools and must be
        considered an invalid archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-331">COMPRESS-331</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipFile.getRawInputStream() is now part of the public API. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-323">COMPRESS-323</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SnappyCompressorInputStream and
        FramedSnappyCompressorInputStream returned 0 at the end of the
        stream under certain circumstances. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-332">COMPRESS-332</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow byte-for-byte replication of Zip entries.
        GitHub Pull Request #6. Thanks to Jason van Zyl.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry's preserveLeadingSlashes is now a property and used
        on later calls to setName, too.
        This behavior is a breaking change. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-328">COMPRESS-328</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Adjusted unit test to updates in Java8 and later that change
        the logic of ZipEntry#getTime. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-326">COMPRESS-326</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream will now recognize GNU long name and
        link entries even if the special entry has a different name
        than GNU tar uses itself.  This seems to be the case for
        archives created by star. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-324">COMPRESS-324</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when InfoZIP type 7875 extra
        fields are read from the central directory. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-321">COMPRESS-321</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added read-only support for bzip2 compression used inside of
        ZIP archives.
        GitHub Pull Request #4. Thanks to Sören Glimm.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.10"></a>
<h2>Release 1.10 – 2015-08-18</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when ZIP extra fields are read
        and the entry contains an UnparseableExtraField. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-317">COMPRESS-317</a>. Thanks to Lucas Werkmeister.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory can now auto-detect DEFLATE streams
        with ZLIB header. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-316">COMPRESS-316</a>. Thanks to Nick Burch.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream can now read entries with group or
        user ids &gt; 0x80000000. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-314">COMPRESS-314</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream can now write entries with group or
        user ids &gt; 0x80000000. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-315">COMPRESS-315</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory can now auto-detect LZMA streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-313">COMPRESS-313</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry's constructor with a File and a String arg
        didn't normalize the name. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-312">COMPRESS-312</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipEncodingHelper no longer reads system properties directly
        to determine the default charset. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-308">COMPRESS-308</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream#read would return -1 when asked to
        read 0 bytes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-309">COMPRESS-309</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory fails to pass on the encoding when creating some streams.
        * ArjArchiveInputStream
        * CpioArchiveInputStream
        * DumpArchiveInputStream
        * JarArchiveInputStream
        * TarArchiveInputStream
        * JarArchiveOutputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-306">COMPRESS-306</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Restore immutability/thread-safety to ArchiveStreamFactory.
        The class is now immutable provided that the method setEntryEncoding is not used.
        The class is thread-safe. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-302">COMPRESS-302</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Restore immutability/thread-safety to CompressorStreamFactory.
        The class is now immutable provided that the method setDecompressConcatenated is not used.
        The class is thread-safe. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-303">COMPRESS-303</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile now throws the specific PasswordRequiredException
        when it encounters an encrypted stream but no password has
        been specified. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-298">COMPRESS-298</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved error message when tar encounters a groupId that is
        too big to write without using the STAR or POSIX format. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-290">COMPRESS-290</a>. Thanks to Kristian Rosenvold.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for parallel compression. This low-level API allows
        a client to build a ZIP/jar file by using the class
        org.apache.commons.compress.archivers.zip.ParallelScatterZipCreator.

        Zip documentation updated with further notes about parallel features.

        Please note that some aspects of jar creation need to be
        handled by client code and is not part of commons-compress for this
        release. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-296">COMPRESS-296</a>. Thanks to Kristian Rosenvold.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Cut overall object instantiation in half by changing file
        header generation algorithm, for a 10-15 percent performance
        improvement.

        Also extracted two private methods createLocalFileHeader
        and createCentralFileHeader in ZipArchiveOutputStream.
        These may have some interesting additional usages in the
        near future. Thanks to Kristian Rosenvold.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipFile logs a warning in its finalizer when its constructor
        has thrown an exception reading the file - for example if the
        file doesn't exist. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-297">COMPRESS-297</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New methods in ZipArchiveOutputStream and ZipFile allows
        entries to be copied from one archive to another without
        having to re-compress them. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-295">COMPRESS-295</a>. Thanks to Kristian Rosenvold.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Moved the package
        org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.z._internal_ to
        org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.lzw and made it part
        of the API that is officially supported.  This will break
        existing code that uses the old package. Thanks to Damjan Jovanovic.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.9"></a>
<h2>Release 1.9 – 2014-10-09</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for DEFLATE streams without any gzip framing. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-263">COMPRESS-263</a>. Thanks to Matthias Stevens.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When reading 7z files unknown file properties and properties
        of type kDummy are now ignored. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-287">COMPRESS-287</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Expanding 7z archives using LZMA compression could cause an
        EOFException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-286">COMPRESS-286</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Checking for XZ for Java may be expensive.  The result will
        now be cached outside of an OSGi environment.  You can use the
        new XZUtils#setCacheXZAvailability to overrride this default
        behavior. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-285">COMPRESS-285</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Long-Name and -link or PAX-header entries in TAR archives
        always had the current time as last modfication time, creating
        archives that are different at the byte level each time an
        archive was built. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-289">COMPRESS-289</a>. Thanks to Bob Robertson.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.8.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.8.1 – 2014-05-14</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency on org.tukaani:xz is now marked as optional.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The snappy, ar and tar inputstreams might fail to read from a
        non-buffered stream in certain cases. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-270">COMPRESS-270</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory can now auto-detect Unix compress
        (".Z") streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-272">COMPRESS-272</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>IOUtils#skip might skip fewer bytes than requested even though
        more could be read from the stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-277">COMPRESS-277</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreams now validate there is a current entry before
        reading or writing entry data. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-276">COMPRESS-276</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArjArchiveInputStream#canReadEntryData tested the current
        entry of the stream rather than its argument.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ChangeSet#delete and deleteDir now properly deal with unnamed
        entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-274">COMPRESS-274</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added a few null checks to improve robustness. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-273">COMPRESS-273</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream failed to read archives with empty
        gid/uid fields. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-278">COMPRESS-278</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream now again throws an exception when it
        encounters a truncated archive while reading from the last
        entry. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-279">COMPRESS-279</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Adapted TarArchiveInputStream#skip to the modified
        IOUtils#skip method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-280">COMPRESS-280</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.8"></a>
<h2>Release 1.8 – 2014-03-12</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream read fewer bytes than possible from
        a truncated stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-253">COMPRESS-253</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZFile failed claiming the dictionary was too large when
        archives used LZMA compression for headers and content and
        certain non-default dictionary sizes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-253">COMPRESS-253</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory.createCompressorInputStream with
        explicit compression did not honor decompressConcatenated. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-259">COMPRESS-259</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>GzipCompressorInputStream now provides access to the same
        metadata that can be provided via GzipParameters when writing
        a gzip stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-260">COMPRESS-260</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream will now read archives created by tar
        implementations that encode big numbers by not adding a
        trailing NUL. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-262">COMPRESS-262</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream would return NUL bytes for the first 512
        bytes of a STORED entry if it was the very first entry of the
        archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-264">COMPRESS-264</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When writing PAX/POSIX headers for TAR entries with
        backslashes or certain non-ASCII characters in their name
        TarArchiveOutputStream could fail. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-265">COMPRESS-265</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory now throws a StreamingNotSupported - a
        new subclass of ArchiveException - if it is asked to read from
        or write to a stream and Commons Compress doesn't support
        streaming for the format.  This currently only applies to the
        7z format. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-267">COMPRESS-267</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>SevenZOutputFile now supports chaining multiple
        compression/encryption/filter methods and passing options to
        the methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-266">COMPRESS-266</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The (compression) method(s) can now be specified per entry in
        SevenZOutputFile. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-261">COMPRESS-261</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>SevenZArchiveEntry "knows" which method(s) have been used to
        write it to the archive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-258">COMPRESS-258</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The 7z package now supports the delta filter as method.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The 7z package now supports BCJ filters for several platforms.
        You will need a version &gt;= 1.5 of XZ for Java to read archives
        using BCJ, though. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-257">COMPRESS-257</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.7"></a>
<h2>Release 1.7 – 2014-01-20</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZOutputFile#closeArchiveEntry throws an exception when
        using LZMA2 compression on Java8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-241">COMPRESS-241</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Read-Only support for Snappy compression. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-147">COMPRESS-147</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>7z reading of big 64bit values could be wrong. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-244">COMPRESS-244</a>. Thanks to Nico Kruber.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Read-Only support for .Z compressed files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-243">COMPRESS-243</a>. Thanks to Damjan Jovanovic.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipFile and ZipArchiveInputStream now support reading entries compressed using the
        SHRINKING method. Thanks to Damjan Jovanovic.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream could fail to read an archive completely. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-245">COMPRESS-245</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The time-setters in X5455_ExtendedTimestamp now set the
        corresponding flags explicitly - i.e. they set the bit if the
        valus is not-null and reset it otherwise.  This may cause
        incompatibilities if you use setFlags to unset a bit and later
        set the time to a non-null value - the flag will now be set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-242">COMPRESS-242</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>GzipCompressorOutputStream now supports setting the compression level and the header metadata
        (filename, comment, modification time, operating system and extra flags). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-250">COMPRESS-250</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipFile and ZipArchiveInputStream now support reading entries compressed using the IMPLODE method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-115">COMPRESS-115</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SevenZOutputFile would create invalid archives if more than
        six empty files or directories were included. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-252">COMPRESS-252</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipFile and the 7z file classes now implement Closeable and
        can be used in try-with-resources constructs.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.6"></a>
<h2>Release 1.6 – 2013-10-26</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarBuffer.tryToConsumeSecondEOFRecord could throw a
        NullPointerException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-223">COMPRESS-223</a>. Thanks to Jeremy Gustie.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for 7z archives.  Most compression algorithms
        can be read and written, LZMA and encryption are only
        supported when reading. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-54">COMPRESS-54</a>. Thanks to Damjan Jovanovic.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added read-only support for ARJ archives that don't use
        compression. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-226">COMPRESS-226</a>. Thanks to Damjan Jovanovic.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Parsing of zip64 extra fields has become more lenient in order
        to be able to read archives created by DotNetZip and maybe
        other archivers as well. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-228">COMPRESS-228</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TAR will now properly read the names of symbolic links with
        long names that use the GNU variant to specify the long file
        name. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-229">COMPRESS-229</a>. Thanks to Christoph Gysin.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipFile#getInputStream could return null if the archive
        contained duplicate entries.
        The class now also provides two new methods to obtain all
        entries of a given name rather than just the first one. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-227">COMPRESS-227</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Readabilty patch to TarArchiveInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-232">COMPRESS-232</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Performance improvements to TarArchiveInputStream, in
        particular to the skip method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-234">COMPRESS-234</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CpioArchiveInputStream failed to read archives created by
        Redline RPM. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-236">COMPRESS-236</a>. Thanks to Andrew Duffy.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream now properly handles link names that
        are too long to fit into a traditional TAR header. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-237">COMPRESS-237</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DumpArchiveInputStream now supports an encoding parameter that
        can be used to specify the encoding of file names.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The CPIO streams now support an encoding parameter that can be
        used to specify the encoding of file names.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Read-only support for LZMA standalone compression has been added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-111">COMPRESS-111</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The auto-detecting create*InputStream methods of Archive and
        CompressorStreamFactory could fail to detect the format of
        blocking input streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-239">COMPRESS-239</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipEncodingHelper.isUTF8(String) does not check all UTF-8 aliases. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-240">COMPRESS-240</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.5"></a>
<h2>Release 1.5 – 2013-03-14</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Typo in CompressorStreamFactory Javadoc. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-218">COMPRESS-218</a>. Thanks to Gili.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved exception message if a ZIP archive cannot be read
        because of an unsupported compression method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-188">COMPRESS-188</a>. Thanks to Harald Kuhn.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory has a setting for file name encoding that
        sets up encoding for ZIP and TAR streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-192">COMPRESS-192</a>. Thanks to Jukka Zitting.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory's tar stream detection created false
        positives for AIFF files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-191">COMPRESS-191</a>. Thanks to Jukka Zitting.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry now has a method to verify its checksum. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-191">COMPRESS-191</a>. Thanks to Jukka Zitting.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XZ for Java didn't provide an OSGi bundle.  Compress'
        dependency on it has now been marked optional so Compress
        itself can still be used in an OSGi context. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-199">COMPRESS-199</a>. Thanks to Jukka Zitting.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When specifying the encoding explicitly TarArchiveOutputStream
        would write unreadable names in GNU mode or even cause errors
        in POSIX mode for file names longer than 66 characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-200">COMPRESS-200</a>. Thanks to Christian Schlichtherle.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Writing TAR PAX headers failed if the generated entry name
        ended with a "/". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-203">COMPRESS-203</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream sometimes failed to provide input to the
        Inflater when it needed it, leading to reads returning 0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-189">COMPRESS-189</a>. Thanks to Daniel Lowe.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Split/spanned ZIP archives are now properly detected by
        ArchiveStreamFactory but will cause an
        UnsupportedZipFeatureException when read.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream now reads archives that start with a
        "PK00" signature.  Archives with this signatures are created
        when the archiver was willing to split the archive but in the
        end only needed a single segment - so didn't split anything. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-208">COMPRESS-208</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry has a new constructor that allows setting
        linkFlag and preserveLeadingSlashes at the same time. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-201">COMPRESS-201</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ChangeSetPerformer has a new perform overload that uses a
        ZipFile instance as input. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-159">COMPRESS-159</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream ignored the encoding for GNU long name
        entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-212">COMPRESS-212</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Garbage collection pressure has been reduced by reusing
        temporary byte arrays in classes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-172">COMPRESS-172</a>. Thanks to Thomas Mair.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Can now handle ZIP extra field 0x5455 - Extended Timestamp. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-210">COMPRESS-210</a>. Thanks to Julius Davies.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>handle ZIP extra field 0x7875 - Info Zip New Unix Extra Field. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-211">COMPRESS-211</a>. Thanks to Julius Davies.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipShort, ZipLong, ZipEightByteInteger should implement Serializable. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-213">COMPRESS-213</a>. Thanks to Julius Davies.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>better support for Unix symlinks in ZipFile entries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-214">COMPRESS-214</a>. Thanks to Julius Davies.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipFile's initialization has been improved for non-Zip64
          archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-215">COMPRESS-215</a>. Thanks to Robin Power.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream could leave the second EOF record
          inside the stream it had just finished reading. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-206">COMPRESS-206</a>. Thanks to Peter De Maeyer.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DumpArchiveInputStream no longer implicitly closes the
          original input stream when it reaches the end of the
          archive.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream now consumes the remainder of the
          archive when getNextZipEntry returns null.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Unit tests could fail if the source tree was checked out to
          a directory tree containign spaces. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-205">COMPRESS-205</a>. Thanks to Daniel Lowe.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated XZ for Java dependency to 1.2 as this version
          provides proper OSGi manifest attributes.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a potential ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when
          reading STORED entries from ZipArchiveInputStream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-219">COMPRESS-219</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory can now be used without XZ for Java
          being available. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-221">COMPRESS-221</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompressorStreamFactory has an option to create
          decompressing streams that decompress the full input for
          formats that support multiple concatenated streams. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-220">COMPRESS-220</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.4.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.4.1 – 2012-05-23</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Ported libbzip2's fallback sort algorithm to
        BZip2CompressorOutputStream to speed up compression in certain
        edge cases.
        Using specially crafted inputs this can be used as a denial
        of service attack.  See the security reports page for details.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.4"></a>
<h2>Release 1.4 – 2012-04-11</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The tar package now allows the encoding of file names to be
        specified and can optionally use PAX extension headers to
        write non-ASCII file names.
        The stream classes now write (or expect to read) archives that
        use the platform's native encoding for file names.  Apache
        Commons Compress 1.3 used to strip everything but the lower
        eight bits of each character which effectively only worked for
        ASCII and ISO-8859-1 file names.
        This new default behavior is a breaking change. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-183">COMPRESS-183</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream failed to parse PAX headers that
        contained non-ASCII characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-184">COMPRESS-184</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The tar package can now write archives that use star/GNU/BSD
        extensions or use the POSIX/PAX variant to store numeric
        values that don't fit into the traditional header fields. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-182">COMPRESS-182</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added a workaround for a Bug some tar implementations that add
        a NUL byte as first byte in numeric header fields. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-181">COMPRESS-181</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added a workaround for a Bug in WinZIP which uses backslashes
        as path separators in Unicode Extra Fields. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-176">COMPRESS-176</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ArrayOutOfBounds while decompressing bz2. Added test case - code already seems to have been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-131">COMPRESS-131</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream throws IllegalArgumentException instead of IOException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-178">COMPRESS-178</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarUtils.formatLongOctalOrBinaryBytes() assumes the field will be 12 bytes long. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-179">COMPRESS-179</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>GNU Tar sometimes uses binary encoding for UID and GID. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-175">COMPRESS-175</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory.createArchiveInputStream would claim
        short text files were TAR archives. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-171">COMPRESS-171</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support for the XZ format has been added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-156">COMPRESS-156</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream now optionally supports reading of
        concatenated .bz2 files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-146">COMPRESS-146</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>GZipCompressorInputStream now optionally supports reading of
        concatenated .gz files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-154">COMPRESS-154</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipFile didn't work properly for archives using unicode extra
        fields rather than UTF-8 filenames and the EFS-Flag. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-164">COMPRESS-164</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The tar package can now read archives that use star/GNU/BSD
        extensions for files that are longer than 8 GByte as well as
        archives that use the POSIX/PAX variant. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-16">COMPRESS-16</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The tar package can now write archives that use star/GNU/BSD
        extensions for files that are longer than 8 GByte as well as
        archives that use the POSIX/PAX variant. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-165">COMPRESS-165</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The tar package can now use the POSIX/PAX variant for writing
        entries with names longer than 100 characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-166">COMPRESS-166</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>For corrupt archives ZipFile would throw a RuntimeException in
        some cases and an IOException in others.  It will now
        consistently throw an IOException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-169">COMPRESS-169</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.3"></a>
<h2>Release 1.3 – 2011-11-01</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support for the Pack200 format has been added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-142">COMPRESS-142</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Read-only support for the format used by the Unix dump(8) tool
        has been added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-132">COMPRESS-132</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The ZIP package now supports Zip64 extensions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-36">COMPRESS-36</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The AR package now supports the BSD dialect of storing file
        names longer than 16 chars (both reading and writing). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-144">COMPRESS-144</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream's getBytesRead method always
        returned 0.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream and ZipArchiveOutputStream could leak
        resources on some JDKs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-152">COMPRESS-152</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream's getBytesWritten method didn't count
        correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-160">COMPRESS-160</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.2 – 2011-07-31</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveInputStream could fail with a "Truncated ZIP" error
        message for entries between 2 GByte and 4 GByte in size. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-129">COMPRESS-129</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveInputStream now detects sparse entries using the
        oldgnu format and properly reports it cannot extract their
        contents. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-145">COMPRESS-145</a>. Thanks to Patrick Dreyer.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ZipArchiveEntry has a new method getRawName that provides the
        original bytes that made up the name.  This may allow user
        code to detect the encoding. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-123">COMPRESS-123</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The Javadoc for ZipArchiveInputStream#skip now matches the
        implementation, the code has been made more defensive. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-130">COMPRESS-130</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream fails if entries contain only blanks for
        userId or groupId. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-140">COMPRESS-140</a>. Thanks to Trejkaz.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ZipFile may leak resources on some JDKs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-139">COMPRESS-139</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ZipFile now implements finalize which closes the underlying
        file.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Certain tar files not recognised by ArchiveStreamFactory. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-117">COMPRESS-117</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BZip2CompressorInputStream throws IOException if underlying stream returns available() == 0.
        Removed the check. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-125">COMPRESS-125</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Calling close() on inputStream returned by CompressorStreamFactory.createCompressorInputStream()
        does not close the underlying input stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-127">COMPRESS-127</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry provides access to the flags that determine
        whether it is an archived symbolic link, pipe or other
        "uncommon" file system object. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-122">COMPRESS-122</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveOutputStream#finish now writes all buffered data to the stream. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-119">COMPRESS-119</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.1 – 2010-08-13</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Move acknowledgements from NOTICE to README. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-72">COMPRESS-72</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarArchiveEntry.parseTarHeader() includes the trailing space/NUL when parsing the octal size. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-113">COMPRESS-113</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Command-line interface to list archive contents.
       Usage: java -jar commons-compress-n.m.jar archive-name [zip|tar|etc]. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-108">COMPRESS-108</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>TarUtils.parseName does not properly handle characters outside the range 0-127. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-118">COMPRESS-118</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ArArchiveInputStream does not handle GNU extended filename records (//). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-112">COMPRESS-112</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_a27c81e23675b73f.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Tar implementation does not support Pax headers
       Added support for reading pax headers.
       Note: does not support global pax headers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-109">COMPRESS-109</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ArchiveStreamFactory does not recognise tar files created by Ant. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-107">COMPRESS-107</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_027392ffc71b176a.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Support "ustar" prefix field, which is used when file paths are longer
       than 100 characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COMPRESS-110">COMPRESS-110</a>.</td>
<td>-</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_d89dcd48c157652a.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Document that the name of an ZipArchiveEntry determines whether
       an entry is considered a directory or not.
       If you don't use the constructor with the File argument the entry's
